name: hoop-sandbox
description: Sandboxed agent runtime for hoop: owns claude execution, sessions, events DB. Exposes an HTTP-over-UDS API consumed by the dashboard.

scripts.build: esbuild server.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node20 --format=esm --outfile=dist/server.mjs --external:better-sqlite3 --external:sqlite-vec --external:openai --banner:js="import { createRequire } from 'module'; const require = createRequire(import.meta.url);"
